_comment: W10a river reach bed: one positional emitter per Terrain river, planted at the reach's midpoint node. Gain scales with Hydrology.flow_norm(river.id) (live discharge, 0..1ish) times gain_ref. Reuses the existing wind_loop.wav placeholder (no new sound card); WaterAudio.gd is the one emitter node type this row and falls_roar.json share.
